barb.strategy: Pump Strength for gear. Double Swing carries hard — zero mana cost at level 9+. Lead the charge, tank hits. Use Howl to manage packs.

zon.strategy: Power Strike is your bread and butter early. Throw normal javelins at range for safety, close in for Power Strike on elites. Save skill points after 12 for Lightning Bolt.

barb.strategy: Transition to Frenzy at level 24 — everything changes. Battle Orders comes online at the same level, buffing both of you massively. Double Swing until then.

zon.strategy: Charged Strike at 18 is a massive power spike — bosses evaporate. Lightning Bolt handles ranged clear. Drop Decoy to tank while you throw from behind.

barb.strategy: Frenzy is your main skill now. Keep BO leveled — both of you benefit hugely. Battle Command at 30 gives +1 all skills. Start looking for runeword bases.

zon.strategy: Lightning Fury at 30 is the biggest power spike in the game. Entire screens die. Focus Charged Strike for bosses, LF for everything else. Valkyrie adds another tank body.

barb.strategy: Max Frenzy, then pump synergies and mastery. You're the boss killer — let the Zon clear to the boss room, then you both unload. Keep Crushing Blow gear handy for Act bosses.

zon.strategy: Max LF first, then CS. Lightning Strike synergizes both. You're the clear speed — throw LF into packs and watch the chain lightning cascade. Titan's Revenge is your holy grail.

barb.strategy: Final build: Frenzy + 3 synergies + BO + Mastery. You handle Physical Immunes with elemental damage weapons (Grief, Lawbringer). Tank everything, leech through damage.

zon.strategy: Full lightning spec. LF + CS maxed with both synergies. Lightning Immunes? The Barb handles them — skip or let your partner kill. Cows, Chaos, Baal runs — you're the clear machine.
